extensionName.description: The display name of the extension.

extensionDescription.message: LSP-powered hover type info, go-to-definition, and signature help on GitHub.com code views
extensionDescription.description: The description of the extension shown in browser stores and extension management.

cmdToggleExtension.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut that toggles the extension.

cmdToggleSidebar.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut that toggles the sidebar.

cmdPinPopover.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut that pins the popover.

popupTitle.description: Title shown in the popup header.

msgExtensionDisabled.description: Shown in popup when extension is toggled off.

msgUnsupportedPage.message: Navigate to a GitHub code page to use gh-lsp
msgUnsupportedPage.description: Shown in popup when the active tab is not a GitHub code page.

labelLanguage.description: Label for the detected language row in the popup.

labelServer.description: Label for the worker/server status row in the popup.

labelDisplay.description: Label for the display mode row in the popup.

btnSettings.description: Text on the button that opens the options page.

btnRetry.description: Text on the retry button shown on error states.

btnDismiss.description: Text on the dismiss button shown on error states.

btnSave.description: Text on the button that saves the PAT.

btnValidate.description: Text on the button that validates the PAT.

sectionAbout.description: Section heading for the about section.

labelDisplayMode.description: Label for the display mode setting.

labelSidebarPosition.description: Label for the sidebar position setting.

labelGithubPat.description: Label for the PAT input field.

labelHoverDebounce.description: Label for the hover debounce slider. $MS$ is the current value.

labelCacheTtl.description: Label for the cache TTL slider. $MINUTES$ is the current value.

labelWorkerIdleTimeout.description: Label for the worker idle timeout slider. $MINUTES$ is the current value.

labelMaxWorkers.description: Label for the max workers slider. $COUNT$ is the current value.

labelVersion.description: Label for the version info in the about section.

labelSource.description: Label for the source code link in the about section.

ariaLabelToggleExtension.description: ARIA label for the extension toggle checkbox.

ariaLabelSwitchToSidebarMode.description: ARIA label for the mode toggle button when current mode is popover.

ariaLabelSwitchToPopoverMode.description: ARIA label for the mode toggle button when current mode is sidebar.

ariaLabelOpenSettings.description: ARIA label for the settings button in the popup.

ariaLabelGoToDefinition.description: ARIA label for the definition link.

ariaLabelClosePopover.description: ARIA label for the popover close button.

ariaLabelPinPopover.description: ARIA label for the popover pin button.

ariaLabelLoadingTypeInfo.description: ARIA label for the loading state.

ariaLabelDismissError.description: ARIA label for the error dismiss button.

ariaLabelRetry.description: ARIA label for the retry button.

ariaLabelCodeIntelligence.description: ARIA label for the sidebar container.

ariaLabelResizeSidebar.description: ARIA label for the sidebar resize handle.

ariaLabelExpandSidebar.description: ARIA label for the sidebar toggle when collapsed.

ariaLabelCollapseSidebar.description: ARIA label for the sidebar toggle when expanded.

sidebarEmptyMessage.message: Hover over a symbol to see type info
sidebarEmptyMessage.description: Placeholder text shown in sidebar when no symbol is hovered.

codeIntelligenceTitle.description: Default sidebar title when no symbol is selected.

errorFailedLoadStatus.description: Error shown in popup when initial load fails.

errorFailedLoadSettings.description: Error shown in options when settings fail to load.

msgLoadingSettings.description: Loading text shown while settings are being fetched.

msgValidating.description: Button text while PAT validation is in progress.

errorNoToken.description: Error shown when validate is clicked with empty input.

errorAuthFailed.description: Error when PAT validation returns a non-200 status.

errorNetworkValidation.description: Error when PAT validation fails due to network issues.

ariaLabelSavePat.description: ARIA label for the save PAT button.

ariaLabelValidatePat.description: ARIA label for the validate PAT button.

ariaLabelHideToken.description: ARIA label for the hide token button.

ariaLabelShowToken.description: ARIA label for the show token button.

ariaLabelHoverDebounce.description: ARIA label for the hover debounce slider.

ariaLabelCacheTtl.description: ARIA label for the cache TTL slider.

ariaLabelWorkerIdleTimeout.description: ARIA label for the worker idle timeout slider.

ariaLabelMaxWorkers.description: ARIA label for the max workers slider.

ariaLabelDisplaySettings.description: ARIA label for the display settings section.

ariaLabelLanguageSettings.description: ARIA label for the language settings section.

ariaLabelAuthSettings.description: ARIA label for the authentication settings section.

ariaLabelPerformanceSettings.description: ARIA label for the performance settings section.

ariaLabelThemeSettings.description: ARIA label for the theme settings section.
